mapper.sql: rorder_no, id, customer_no, user_no, end_user, ROrdDate, dlv_entire, DlvSite, TransFee, PrjCode, DlvType, Employee, EmployeeNo, OptTime, Operator, ORorderNo, ContractNo, QuotationNo, PurchaseNO, dept_No, HLCode, delivery_dept_no, trade_companyId, create_time, create_user, update_time, update_user, purchase_unit_code
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.rcvmaster
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.rcvmaster (rorder_no, id, customer_no, user_no, end_user, ROrdDate, dlv_entire, DlvSite, TransFee, PrjCode, DlvType, Employee, EmployeeNo, OptTime, Operator, ORorderNo, ContractNo, QuotationNo, PurchaseNO, dept_No, HLCode, delivery_dept_no, trade_companyId, create_time, create_user, update_time, update_user, purchase_unit_code) values (#{rorderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{endUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rorddate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{dlvEntire,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{dlvsite,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{transfee,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{prjcode,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{dlvtype,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{employee,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{employeeno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{opttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{operator,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ororderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{contractno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quotationno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{purchaseno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{deptNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hlcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deliveryDeptNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tradeCompanyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{purchaseUnitCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

mapper.update:
update dbo.rcvmaster
rorder_no = #{record.rorderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
customer_no = #{record.customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_no = #{record.userNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
end_user = #{record.endUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ROrdDate = #{record.rorddate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
dlv_entire = #{record.dlvEntire,jdbcType=CHAR},
DlvSite = #{record.dlvsite,jdbcType=CHAR},
TransFee = #{record.transfee,jdbcType=CHAR},
PrjCode = #{record.prjcode,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
DlvType = #{record.dlvtype,jdbcType=CHAR},
Employee = #{record.employee,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
EmployeeNo = #{record.employeeno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OptTime = #{record.opttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
Operator = #{record.operator,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ORorderNo = #{record.ororderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ContractNo = #{record.contractno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
QuotationNo = #{record.quotationno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PurchaseNO = #{record.purchaseno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
dept_No = #{record.deptNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
HLCode = #{record.hlcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
delivery_dept_no = #{record.deliveryDeptNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
trade_companyId = #{record.tradeCompanyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_user = #{record.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_user = #{record.updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
purchase_unit_code = #{record.purchaseUnitCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update dbo.rcvmaster set rorder_no = #{record.rorderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, customer_no = #{record.customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_no = #{record.userNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, end_user = #{record.endUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ROrdDate = #{record.rorddate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, dlv_entire = #{record.dlvEntire,jdbcType=CHAR}, DlvSite = #{record.dlvsite,jdbcType=CHAR}, TransFee = #{record.transfee,jdbcType=CHAR}, PrjCode = #{record.prjcode,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, DlvType = #{record.dlvtype,jdbcType=CHAR}, Employee = #{record.employee,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EmployeeNo = #{record.employeeno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OptTime = #{record.opttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, Operator = #{record.operator,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORorderNo = #{record.ororderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ContractNo = #{record.contractno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, QuotationNo = #{record.quotationno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PurchaseNO = #{record.purchaseno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, dept_No = #{record.deptNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, HLCode = #{record.hlcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, delivery_dept_no = #{record.deliveryDeptNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, trade_companyId = #{record.tradeCompanyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_user = #{record.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_user = #{record.updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, purchase_unit_code = #{record.purchaseUnitCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update dbo.rcvmaster
id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
customer_no = #{customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_no = #{userNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
end_user = #{endUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ROrdDate = #{rorddate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
dlv_entire = #{dlvEntire,jdbcType=CHAR},
DlvSite = #{dlvsite,jdbcType=CHAR},
TransFee = #{transfee,jdbcType=CHAR},
PrjCode = #{prjcode,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
DlvType = #{dlvtype,jdbcType=CHAR},
Employee = #{employee,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
EmployeeNo = #{employeeno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OptTime = #{opttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
Operator = #{operator,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ORorderNo = #{ororderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ContractNo = #{contractno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
QuotationNo = #{quotationno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PurchaseNO = #{purchaseno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
dept_No = #{deptNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
HLCode = #{hlcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
delivery_dept_no = #{deliveryDeptNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
trade_companyId = #{tradeCompanyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_user = #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_user = #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
purchase_unit_code = #{purchaseUnitCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where rorder_no = #{rorderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update dbo.rcvmaster set id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, customer_no = #{customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_no = #{userNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, end_user = #{endUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ROrdDate = #{rorddate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, dlv_entire = #{dlvEntire,jdbcType=CHAR}, DlvSite = #{dlvsite,jdbcType=CHAR}, TransFee = #{transfee,jdbcType=CHAR}, PrjCode = #{prjcode,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, DlvType = #{dlvtype,jdbcType=CHAR}, Employee = #{employee,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EmployeeNo = #{employeeno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OptTime = #{opttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, Operator = #{operator,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORorderNo = #{ororderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ContractNo = #{contractno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, QuotationNo = #{quotationno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PurchaseNO = #{purchaseno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, dept_No = #{deptNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, HLCode = #{hlcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, delivery_dept_no = #{deliveryDeptNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, trade_companyId = #{tradeCompanyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_user = #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_user = #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, purchase_unit_code = #{purchaseUnitCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where rorder_no = #{rorderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
